$comment: c12 D-PP-IF-CHAR-CONSTANT: character constants in the `#if` const-expr (C 6.10.1p4) — `'A'` is an INT (ASCII 65). pp_if_eval's parsePrimary gained a char-literal primary (`'` opener + coalesced body via shared decodeCharLiteralBody); the shared escape decoder gained an OCTAL arm (`'\301'`). RED-ON-DISABLE: remove the char-literal primary and `#if 'A' == 65` fails (P0013). The pe arm RUNS on the windows leg; elf/macho/arm64 on the linux/darwin/qemu legs; the release arm witnesses the optimizer.
